query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A cyclist wearing an orange and black jacket and a helmet rides a blue mountain bike on a paved path. The background consists of indistinct horizontal streaks of white, blue, and green, indicating rapid movement.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A cyclist wearing an orange and black jacket and a helmet rides a blue mountain bike on a paved path. The image is characterized by strong intentional motion blur, rendering the background and ground as horizontal streaks of white, blue, and green to emphasize speed and dynamism.
